title: Large Cash Transaction Reporting
passage: Any cash transaction or series of related transactions exceeding $10,000 within a 24-hour period must be reported to FinCEN via CTR filing within 15 days of the transaction date.

title: Wire Transfer Velocity Threshold
passage: Outbound wire transfers that exceed 3 standard deviations from the customer's 90-day rolling average, or exceed $50,000 to a jurisdiction rated HIGH risk, trigger mandatory enhanced due diligence review before settlement.

title: PEP Enhanced Due Diligence
passage: Transactions involving Politically Exposed Persons or their immediate family members require senior management approval for amounts exceeding $25,000 and must be reviewed by the compliance team within 2 business days.

title: High-Risk Jurisdiction SWIFT Controls
passage: SWIFT transfers to jurisdictions on the FATF grey or black list require pre-transaction compliance approval, correspondent bank verification, and beneficiary identity confirmation before funds are released.
